method: semodule -DB (disable dontaudit globally) then semodule -B (re-enable). Fully reversible.
description: Real AVC denials captured from existing confined domains after semodule -DB on Rocky 10.2 (el10, kernel 6.12, selinux-policy-42).
audit_format_note: audit 4.0.3 on el10: AVC record format IDENTICAL to audit 3.x. Fields: type=AVC, msg=audit(timestamp:serial), avc: denied {permission} for pid=N comm=S scontext=S tcontext=S tclass=C permissive=0|1. No new fields in audit 4.x AVC records. The selinux-policy-42 on el10 contains more builtin permissive types (21 builtin vs fewer on el8/el9) reflecting newer systemd/virtd components.
